message:
fix: LIFO recycling demo was re-closing scopes, masking LIFO order

The demo freed 4 scopes (pushing slots to free_list), then created
4 new scopes but CLOSED EACH ONE IMMEDIATELY. This pushed each
slot back onto the free list after every allocation, so the SAME
slot (the most recent) was reused every time — masking the LIFO
order.

Fix: keep reused scopes OPEN during the test so each allocation
actually pops the NEXT item from the LIFO stack. Clean up all
scopes at the end.

Verified against actual Rust code:
- src/types/wasm_abi.rs:870: "Free slots are recycled LIFO"
- src/types/wasm_abi.rs:884: free_list: Vec<u32> (stack)
- src/types/wasm_abi.rs:932: free_list.pop() (LIFO pop)
- src/types/wasm_abi.rs:1116: free_list.push() (LIFO push)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
